identity.canonical_title: Structured Growth Information Theoretic Linkage Define Information Relation

theory.canonical_statement: ID5113 records Structured Growth Information Theoretic Linkage Define Information Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `TZPID_exports\math_methods\all_edit_equation_arc_compact\entries.csv` for registry alignment and later derivation.

latex_blocks: $) structured growth. \subsection{Information-Theoretic Linkage} Define information entropies for the three primary systems: \begin{align} H_{\mathrm{fib}} &= \sum_{i} -p_{i}\log p_{i}, & p_{i} &\propto \frac{F_{i}}{\sum_{k} F_{k}}, \\ H_{\mathrm{spec}}(N) &= \text{entropy of prism cascade after $
